name: Sprint 9 - Risk Management
context: Primary focus areas: Risk Mgmt (2), Compliance (1), Migration (1).

notable_completed.title: Team Upskilling Program - Create training/upskilling documentation and artifacts
notable_completed.summary: Team upskilling program documentation complete. 8-person team assessed across 6 core technology areas. Skill assessment shows distributed expertise: 3 high-performers (4.6+ average), 3 mid-level (3.4-3.6), 2 requiring intervention (2.6-2.8).......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Continuous learning: tRPC, Next.js 16.0.10 (Turbopack FS caching, Cache Components, proxy replacing middleware), LangChain
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Continuous learning: tRPC, Next.js 16.0.10 (Turbopack FS caching, Cache Components, proxy replacing middleware), LangChain

notable_completed.title: Plan and execute legacy system migration: discover and map data; assess data quality; design migration scripts; run rehearsals and reconciliation reporting; finalize cutover with rollback plan
notable_completed.description: Plan and execute legacy system migration: discover and map data; assess data quality; design migration scripts; run rehearsals and reconciliation reporting; finalize cutover with rollback plan
notable_completed.summary: IFC-145 Legacy System Migration - Migration planning documents and scripts created successfully. All required artifacts generated with comprehensive coverage:......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Data mapping documents created; migration scripts developed and tested; rehearsal migration executed with reconciliation reports; cutover plan created with rollback procedure; final migration executed with acceptance of accuracy and completeness; targets: >=99%
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Create mapping.csv with Source_Table, Source_Column, Target_Table, Target_Column, Transform columns; Create rehearsal-report.md documenting test migration results; Create cutover-plan.md with phases, rollback triggers, and recovery steps

notable_completed.title: Distributed Tracing & Logging
notable_completed.summary: 99% of requests traced via OpenTelemetry middleware; All 34 API endpoints have distributed tracing enabled; Correlation IDs propagate across service boundaries 99% of requests traced; Dashboards available; Trace coverage report created
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: 99% of requests traced, dashboards available; artifacts: dashboard-catalog.md, context_ack.json; gates: coverage-gte-90
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: 99% of requests traced; Dashboards available; Trace coverage report created

notable_completed.title: Audit Logs Encryption & Compliance
notable_completed.description: Encrypt and aggregate audit logs; automate compliance reporting
notable_completed.summary: Task must create three required artifacts; Encryption module must support AES-256-GCM with key rotation; Retention policy must document compliance requirements Create audit-encryption-module.ts with AES-256-GCM encryption;...
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Audit logs encrypted and stored centrally; scheduled exports for compliance frameworks; data minimization applied; artifacts: encryption.ts, audit-logger.ts, retention-policy.md, compliance-report.md
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Create audit-encryption-module.ts with AES-256-GCM encryption; Create retention-policy.md documenting retention periods, compliance, and purge schedules; Create attestation.json with verdict: COMPLETE

notable_completed.title: Create OpenTelemetry config and observability documentation
notable_completed.description: Instrument application with OpenTelemetry, unify logs, metrics and traces
notable_completed.summary: OpenTelemetry instrumentation fully configured and documented. All services can push traces, metrics, and logs.... All services emit structured logs, traces and metrics; dashboards and alerts created; SLOs defined
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: All services emit structured logs, traces and metrics; dashboards and alerts created; SLOs defined; targets: >=100%, <2min
